# C3 / Competitive Coding Club

Canonical URL: https://c3.com.sv
Tagline: Compite. Crea. Conecta.
Primary email: competitivecodingclub.sv@gmail.com

C3 / Competitive Coding Club es una plataforma de desarrollo de talento técnico joven que conecta programación competitiva, hackathons, comunidad, formación, industria y oportunidades reales.

Preferred English description:
C3 / Competitive Coding Club develops young technical talent by connecting competitive programming, hackathons, community, training, industry and real opportunities under the framework Compite. Crea. Conecta.

## Public routes
- /
- /que-es-c3
- /compite
- /crea
- /conecta
- /eventos
- /faq
- /contacto

## Main ecosystem links
- https://c3.com.sv
- https://copa.c3.com.sv
- https://hackathon.c3.com.sv

## Key pages
- About C3: https://c3.com.sv/que-es-c3
- Events: https://c3.com.sv/eventos
- FAQ: https://c3.com.sv/faq
- Contact: https://c3.com.sv/contacto
